classes.description: This class represents a message alarm.
classes.name: display alarm

properties.description: The interval in minutes between the event and the alarm: (positive for alarm that trigger after the event date or negative for alarms that trigger before).
properties.name: trigger interval

classes.description: This class represents a mail alarm.
classes.name: mail alarm

properties.description: The interval in minutes between the event and the alarm: (positive for alarm that trigger after the event date or negative for alarms that trigger before).
properties.name: trigger interval

classes.description: This class represents a sound alarm.
classes.name: sound alarm

properties.description: The interval in minutes between the event and the alarm: (positive for alarm that trigger after the event date or negative for alarms that trigger before).
properties.name: trigger interval

properties.description: The system sound name to be used for the alarm
properties.name: sound name

properties.description: The (POSIX) path to the sound file to be used for the alarm
properties.name: sound file

classes.description: This class represents an 'open file' alarm. Starting with OS X 10.14, it is not possible to create new open file alarms or view URLs for existing open file alarms. Trying to save or modify an open file alarm will result in a save error. Editing other aspects of events or reminders that have existing open file alarms is allowed as long as the alarm isn't modified.
classes.name: open file alarm

properties.description: The interval in minutes between the event and the alarm: (positive for alarm that trigger after the event date or negative for alarms that trigger before).
properties.name: trigger interval

properties.description: The (POSIX) path to be opened by the alarm
properties.name: filepath

properties.description: The first and last name of the attendee.
properties.name: display name

properties.description: The invitation status for the attendee.
properties.name: participation status

properties.description: True if the event is an all-day event
properties.name: allday event

properties.description: The iCalendar (RFC 2445) string describing the event recurrence, if defined
properties.name: recurrence

properties.description: The URL associated to the event.
properties.name: url

commands.description: Creates a new calendar (obsolete, will be removed in next release)
commands.name: create calendar

commands.description: Tell the application to reload all calendar files contents
commands.name: reload calendars

commands.description: Show calendar on the given view
commands.name: switch view

parameters.description: the calendar view to be displayed
parameters.name: to

commands.description: Show calendar on the given date
commands.name: view calendar

commands.description: Subscribe to a remote calendar through a webcal or http URL
commands.name: GetURL

commands.description: Show the event or to-do in the calendar window
commands.name: show

parameters.description: The class of the new object.
parameters.name: new

parameters.description: The location at which to insert the object.
parameters.name: at

parameters.description: The initial contents of the object.
parameters.name: with data

parameters.description: The initial values for properties of the object.
parameters.name: with properties
